title: 2D Stiffness Method Analysis
description: Calculate the stiffness matrix and force vector for 2D elements.

young_modulus.description: Young Modulus. Symbol: E. Units: MPa. Material Young Modulus

section_type.description: Section Type. Symbol: \rm{Section}. Type of the section

section_area.description: Section Area. Symbol: A. Units: mm2. Area of the element's cross section

section_inertia.description: Section Inertia. Symbol: I. Units: mm4. Moment of Inertia of the element's cross section

section_base.description: Base. Symbol: b. Units: mm. Base (width) of the rectangular section

section_height.description: Height. Symbol: h. Units: mm. Height of the rectangular section

section_BFt.description: tf, btm. Symbol: t_{flange,\;bottom}. Units: mm. Bottom flange thickness

section_BFw.description: wf, btm. Symbol: w_{flange,\;bottom}. Units: mm. Bottom flange width

section_TFt.description: tf, top. Symbol: t_{flange,\;top}. Units: mm. Top flange thickness

section_TFw.description: wf, top. Symbol: w_{flange,\;top}. Units: mm. Top flange width

section_Wt.description: tweb. Symbol: t_{web}. Units: mm. Web thickness

section_h.description: Height. Symbol: h. Units: mm. Profile height

section_diam.description: Diameter. Symbol: ⌀. Units: mm. Section diameter

member_length.description: Length. Symbol: L. Units: m. Member Length

member_rotation.description: Inclination. Symbol: \alpha. Units: °. Member Inclination counter-clockwise wrt to the horizon

point_load_values.description: Point load values. Symbol: P. Units: N. Comma separated vertical load values

point_load_locations.description: Point load locations. Symbol: L. Units: %. Comma separated vertical load relative locations

uid.description: Calculator unique identifier — must match the endpoint uid.

current_unit_system.description: Unit system for input values and output display.

project_details.description: Optional project metadata for the PDF report header.
